description: Real-world messy input to structured output with verifiable content — repair estimates, daily reports, invoices

questions.question:
Convert these field notes into a repair estimate with line items, labor, and total. Show all dollar amounts.

replaced cap C14 on main board. also swapped the relay K3, it was burnt. took about 2 hrs. parts were $45 for the cap and $120 for the relay. customer wants the compressor checked next visit too. unit is a Trane XR15.

Convert these raw service logs into a structured daily report. Each site should be its own section with status and follow-up actions.

8:00 - arrived site A, replaced filter on unit 3. took 30 min.
9:30 - site B, diagnosed bad contactor on rooftop unit. ordered part, eta 2 days.
11:00 - site C, PM on 3 units. all good except unit 2 has a slow refrigerant leak. needs return visit.
1:00 - lunch
2:00 - site D, installed new thermostat. customer trained on programming.
4:00 - drove back, did paperwork.

Calculate and format a professional invoice. Show all math.

Customer: ABC Manufacturing
Job: RTU compressor replacement
Parts: Compressor $1,200, Refrigerant R-410A 8lbs $320, Contactor $85
Labor: 6 hours @ $95/hr = $570
Travel: $75
Tax: 8.5% on parts only.

List all line items and calculate the grand total.

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests conversion of messy real-world field notes into structured documents with verifiable numerical content
